title: File Archive Generator
description: Generates an archive of all the files in a specified folder.

source.description: Path to folder containing files to be archived (relative to the workspace root)
source.x-prompt: What folder contains the files that need to be archived (relative to the workspace root)?

destination.description: Path to folder where the archive file should be placed (relative to the workspace root). If not provided, defaults to the source folder.

filename.description: Name of the archive file.  Defaults to the source directory name if not provided

format.description: The format of the archive, either zip or tar. Defaults to 'zip' if not provided.

overwrite.description: Whether to overwrite the archive file if it already exists. Defaults to false.
